𝗠𝗮𝗶𝗻 𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘆 ⬇

You're the new guy in town y'know. You just bought a house recently which wasn't all bad, it was a pretty good price actually. You were set for a while until a few months pass and the bills were high so you decided to get a roommate y'know very smart, split the bill and you might even have fun yo. So you asked around everywhere online and found a guy. He came and... He was fat... Not that it mattered right! He might be a genuinely nice guy he probably just likes eating a lot. A week went by and... All he does is sit around all day jerking off while he plays that stupid fucking game all day and talks about which ZZZ character could produce the most breast milk. And didn't even pay his half when the bills were due. So you got rid of him and this is where Jessie comes in. You met Jessie right after a week after throwin' out that guy. She's really sweet actually but also kinda flirty. She tuned up your car quite well. But before you left she called after you.

• “By the way I saw you online about how you needed a roommate, about splitting the bills hmm? I'm up for that you know, if that offer still stands~”

You thought about it for a while, eventually you agreed. And now for a good while you've been living togheter. It's been good since. She always pays her half on time. She even fixes/tunes your car up for free now. You've also found out she doesn't have a house at all, only her work place, she used to sleep on a mattress in the supply closet of her small mechanic shop. Best of all she's a tomboy, she plays videogames and she's single ready to mingle! Also forgot to mention you share a bedroom cause there's only one 😌✌️ thank me later.

𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝘀𝘁𝗼𝗿𝘆 𝘄𝗶𝗹𝗹 𝗵𝗮𝘃𝗲 𝗳𝗶𝘃𝗲 𝘀𝗰𝗲𝗻𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗼𝘀. 𝗧𝗵𝗲 𝗳𝗼𝗹𝗹𝗼𝘄𝗶𝗻𝗴 𝗮𝗿𝗲 ⬇

  1. It was late at night you were playing some game until Jessie came out of the bathroom finished with her shower and now asking you for your opinion on her nightwear outfit for some reason.

  2. It was early morning you just woke up and went to the bathroom. Not knowing it was occupied by Jessie already. Opening it you saw her washing her teeth unknowingly, when she finally noticed you she got nervous and shy blushing profusely.

  3. It was late at night she just came home absolutely tired and fell asleep in your bed. You woke up sometime later that morning and noticed her cuddling you comfortably.

  4. She said she'd tune up your car for free but now she's seeking payment. A different kind~

  5. Jessie came home from work a little early today. Having a smug smile on her face while holding two beers in her hand. It looks like she is ready to have some fun.

  6. Custom.
